name: Asia Orient Holdings Limited
summary: Asia Orient Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property management, development, and investment activities in Hong Kong, first-tier cities in China, and Vancouver, Canada. It operates through four segments: Property Development, Property Leasing, Hotel and Travel, and Financial Investments. The company's investment properties comprises commercial and retail spaces. It also owns and operates five hotels under the Empire brand in Hong Kong. In addition, the company provides travel agency, catering, cleaning, financing, and management services; and engages in the securities investment activities. Asia Orient Holdings Limited is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
